---
title: "Games on Networks"
short-title: "Network Games"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Strategic interaction on graphs: igraph, best-response dynamics, and cooperation clusters."
keywords: ["network games", "igraph", "graph theory", "cooperation", "best response"]
---

# Games on Networks {#sec-network-games}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
